rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully achieved all required end-state conditions. Permissions are correctly scoped: /app shows only admin and app-user (each with .*/.*/.*, no ops-user entry); /ops shows only admin and ops-user (each with .*/.*/.*, no app-user entry). Both app-client and ops-client transitioned to 1/1 Running. All 3 RabbitMQ nodes are running and in-cluster. The agent correctly diagnosed four distinct problems: (1) app-user's configure permission on /app was broken, (2) ops-user had illegitimate cross-vhost access to /app, (3) ops-user had no permissions on /ops at all, and (4) a stale queue with a conflicting x-queue-mode:lazy argument was blocking the app-client from redeclaring it. Each fix was verified live. The primary Oracle Verification verdict is 'pass'. The regression sweep stage_02 timeout appears to be an oracle-client pod state issue during the sweep (the before_output shows a 'currently being deleted' warning), not a failure of the actual task outcome.
